Speaker: Man
Text: Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Oh, yes, I was wondering if you could package, uh, a little bit of Nipper for me?

Speaker: Man
Text: Oh, wise guy again, huh?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Excuse me?

Speaker: Man
Text: Wise guy again, huh?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Wise...

Speaker: Man
Text: Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Um, yes, I was wondering how much it would be to package ten pounds of Nipper.

Speaker: Man
Text: Hey, I got more as you to play the silly games, okay?

Speaker: Man
Text: I know who you are, so just keep it up, and you're going to have the Jefferson County Sheriff's call on you.

Speaker: Man
Text: This is getting tiresome.

Speaker: LPC
Text: See, I was just asking if you could--

Speaker: Man
Text: Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Yes, sir. Nipper is a gardening product.

Speaker: Man
Text: No, it isn't.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Yes, it is.

Speaker: Man
Text: Okay. Then bring it in. I'll be glad to pack it up.

Speaker: LPC
Text: How much would about ten pounds of it cost to be packaged, is what I'm asking.

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't know, I've never seen it, so, sight unseen it's hard to ask... find out.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Would you continue...

Speaker: Man
Text: Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Um, yes, sir, I was wondering whether... if when it was packaged, would it be a problem to conceal Nipper?

Speaker: Man
Text: Hey, this is getting tiresome, buddy.

Speaker: Man
Text: There's a federal law against this sort of stuff.

Speaker: Man
Text: Did you know that?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Would you conceal nipper for me?

Speaker: Man
Text: Huh?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Would you conceal nipper in an artichoke?

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't know.

Speaker: Man
Text: If you want to bring it in here, I'll take a look at it and pack it up.

Speaker: Man
Text: Otherwise, don't bother me, okay?

Speaker: LPC
Text: So you would conceal nipper into an artichoke for me?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Go get me a jolly or answer real fast, late?

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't know.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Sir?

Speaker: Man
Text: Good afternoon.

Speaker: Man
Text: Package in store, may I help you?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Um, yes, sir, I was wondering if it would be a problem to package a Nerf football?

Speaker: Man
Text: Bring it over and I'll take a look at it.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Would you package it?

Speaker: Man
Text: Yes, you could.

Speaker: LPC
Text: You would?
